word_list.word: a man is a lion in his own cause
word_list.pronunciation: ɐ mˈæn ɪz ɐ lˈaɪən ɪn hɪz ˈoʊn kˈɔːz

senses.definition: used to suggest that personal investment in a situation increases motivation, leading individuals to exceed expectations by putting in extra effort

word_list.word: a rolling stone gathers no moss
word_list.pronunciation: ɐ ɹˈoʊlɪŋ stˈoʊn ɡˈæðɚz nˈoʊ mˈɔs

senses.definition: used to suggest that someone who keeps moving and changing their situation will not accumulate problems or responsibilities, but also will not gain the benefits of stability or permanence

word_list.word: a thing begun is half done
word_list.pronunciation: ɐ θˈɪŋ bɪɡˈʌn ɪz hˈæf dˈʌn

senses.definition: used to suggest that starting a task or project is the most difficult part and that taking the first step is critical to achieving success, as it sets the momentum for completion

word_list.word: he that will to Cupar maun to Cupar
word_list.pronunciation: hiː ðæt wˈɪltə kjˈuːpɑːɹ mˈɔːn tə kjˈuːpɑːɹ

senses.definition: used to suggest that if someone is truly determined to achieve a goal or reach a destination, they will not be easily dissuaded or discouraged

word_list.word: if opportunity does not knock, build a door
word_list.pronunciation: ɪf ɑːpɚtˈuːnɪɾi dʌznˌɑːt nˈɑːk bˈɪld ɐ dˈoːɹ

senses.definition: used to suggest that if an opportunity does not naturally present itself, one should persistently work towards creating opportunities and overcoming obstacles to achieve success

word_list.word: nothing is easy to the unwilling
word_list.pronunciation: nˈʌθɪŋ ɪz ˈiːzi tə ðɪ ʌnwˈɪlɪŋ

senses.definition: used to suggest that if someone lacks motivation or is unwilling to put in the effort required to succeed, they are likely to find even the simplest tasks to be difficult or challenging

word_list.word: who says A, must say B
word_list.pronunciation: hˌuː sˈɛz ˈeɪ mˈʌst sˈeɪ bˈiː

senses.definition: used to suggest that if someone starts or initiates a particular action or process,  it is expected that they will continue and complete the subsequent steps

word_list.word: nothing is impossible to a willing heart
word_list.pronunciation: nˈʌθɪŋ ɪz ɪmpˈɑːsəbəl tʊ ɐ wˈɪlɪŋ hˈɑːɹt

senses.definition: used to emphasize that if someone is determined and willing to work hard, they can achieve anything they set their mind to, regardless of the difficulty or complexity of the task

word_list.word: you cannot keep a good man down
word_list.pronunciation: juː kænˈɑːt kˈiːp ɐ ɡˈʊd mˈæn dˈaʊn

senses.definition: used to imply that a determined individual will succeed despite the odds and difficulties
used to imply that with determination and perseverance, one can overcome obstacles and achieve their goals, no matter how difficult or daunting they may seem

examples.x: Despite the numerous obstacles she faced, Jane kept pushing forward, proving that the sea refuses no river when it comes to achieving one's goals.
